curation_notes: The patch modifies a single non-test source file (pkg/genutil/slicez/chunking.go). The fix changes uint16 casts to uint64 in the ForEachChunkUntil function to prevent integer overflow when input slices exceed 65535 elements. The vulnerability class integer-overflow matches the CWE-190 assignment and is confirmed by the diff. No sibling files with the same vulnerability pattern exist in the directory at the pre-patch commit.
